content: The realization about the existence or non-existence of God varies greatly among individuals and cultures, influenced by personal beliefs, experiences, and philosophical perspectives. Some may come to this conclusion through scientific inquiry, while others may hold onto their faith throughout their lives. There is no specific timeline for when or if a consensus will be reached on this matter.
